# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 2, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the introduction of a new feature with the proposal of a plugin for economic memory for AI agents, indicating a focus on enhancing agent capabilities.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- **New Feature Proposal: Economic Memory Plugin**
  A new pull request, [#6701](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6701), has been opened to add a `plugin-mnemopay`. This plugin aims to provide economic memory capabilities for AI agents, suggesting an enhancement in how agents manage and process economic-related information.
